query:
ALTER TABLE expenses 
ADD COLUMN departureTime varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN arrivalTime varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN checkInDate timestamp DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN checkOutDate timestamp DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN liters int DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN pricePerLiter int DEFAULT NULL;
